page: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highcpu-64 is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance belonging to the c4d server family. It features 64 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 architecture, paired with 120.0 GB of system memory. This configuration yields a memory-to-core ratio of approximately 1.88 GB per vCPU, prioritizing raw processing power over memory capacity.

This instance does not include local NVMe storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached block storage. Additionally, it does not bundle complimentary public IPv4 addresses. These design choices minimize hardware overhead, making the instance a streamlined option for workloads that do not require local disk caching or graphics acceleration.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation and high core density provide predictable compute performance without the premium associated with large memory footprints or specialized accelerator hardware. The c4d-highcpu-64 is designed for compute-intensive workloads such as batch processing, high-performance web serving, distributed analytics, and CI/CD compilation pipelines where CPU throughput is the primary bottleneck.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highcpu-64 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server instance featuring 64 dedicated vCPUs and 120.0 GB of RAM. With a memory-to-core ratio of 1.88 GB per vCPU, this instance is engineered to support compute-heavy workloads while minimizing memory overhead. The server does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, requiring external network-attached storage for data persistence. This streamlined hardware profile offers qualitative cost efficiency by focusing resources strictly on dedicated CPU capacity. It is highly suited for workloads such as batch processing, continuous integration and delivery (CI/CD) pipelines, web serving, and distributed compute tasks that demand high-density processing power without the need for massive memory allocations or local disk performance.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4d-highcpu-64 is a compute-optimized instance with 64 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 120 GB RAM, designed for high-throughput processing without local storage or GPU overhead.

tagline: A high-density, compute-optimized virtual server featuring sixty-four dedicated cores and streamlined memory for processor-intensive workloads.
